title: Selective Warping of Positive-Energy-Density Seeds via Differentiable Constrained Optimization
description: Public release of the cleaned optimization, diagnostics, plotting, and verification workflow used for the revised warp-drive energy-condition study. The release is intended to support code and data reproducibility for journal review and includes regenerated golden bundles plus direct manuscript-target evaluations.

creators.name: Bolivar, Nelson
